_comment: Skill hub registry — a plain JSON index in a curated git repo. Point Urfael at it with URFAEL_HUB_INDEX (or host it at the default and Urfael finds it). Browse with `urfael hub`; install with `urfael hub install <slug>`. EVERY install runs the safety scanner + an sha256 integrity check + a full-content preview, and the agent NEVER executes a skill — so a poisoned listing can't install and a swapped payload at a pinned URL is rejected. Authors: `urfael hub publish <file>` prints the entry (incl. its sha256) to PR here.
name: Urfael skills

skills.title: Inbox triage
skills.description: Summarize unread mail into a 3-bullet brief and draft replies (never sends).
skills.author: Grandillionaire

skills.title: Daily brief
skills.description: Pull today's calendar + open tasks into a spoken morning brief.
skills.author: Grandillionaire
